description: Adapted from the OpenLoadHub K6 dashboard for the gRPC runtime path. Keeps the recordId contract plus the shared iteration/checks/request panels that current K6 gRPC runs can already materialize.

links.title: Grafana k6 OSS Docs: Prometheus Remote Write
links.tooltip: Open docs in a new tab

panels.description: 展示全 run 当前驻留/已初始化的 VUs 总量（raw k6_vus_max）；比瞬时 busy VUs 更适合作为主读数，不等于场景容量上限 maxVUs。
panels.title: 当前驻留 VUs

panels.description: 统一按平滑时间窗展示 gRPC 请求 QPS，并保留 dropped_iterations_qps；避免把瞬时 irate 尖刺误读成真实吞吐。
panels.title: gRPC 请求 QPS

panels.description: Select a different Stat to change the query
panels.title: 迭代处理时长

panels.description: Select a different Stat to change the query HTTP-specific built-in metrics
panels.title: Checks 成功率趋势

panels.description: Select a different Stat to change the query

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__range])))

panels.title: gRPC 接口时延概览

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(1, sum by(name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(1, sum by(name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__range])))

panels.description: gRPC interface summary depends on the available endpoint-name tags and quantile stats.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId="$recordId"}[$__range])))

panels.title: gRPC 接口明细

options.content: ### Visualize other k6 results At the top of the dashboard, click `Add` and select `Visualization` from the dropdown menu. Choose the visualization type and input the PromQL queries for the `k6_` metric(s). Alternatively, click on the `Explore` icon on the menu bar and input the queries for the `k6_` metric(s). From `Explore`, you can add new Panels to this dashboard. Note that all k6 metrics are prefixed with the `k6_` namespace when sent to Prometheus.

list.description: Statistic for Trend Metrics Queries. The available options depend on the values of the K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS setting.
list.label: Trend Metrics Query
list.name: quantile_stat

list.description: Adhoc filters are applied to all panels. To enable it, go to Dashboard Settings / Variables / adhoc_filter and select the target Prometheus data source.
list.label: AdhocFilter
list.name: adhoc_filter

title: K6 gRPC Dashboard (OpenLoadHub)
